summary: Iteration 78: Tested Menu Designer feature for Guest Ordering Platform. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed all Menu Designer UI elements working: 3 sub-tabs (QR & Periods, Menu Designer, Menu Items), 5 layout presets, typography dropdowns, color pickers, display options, card styles, and live preview. Dynamic styling on /guest-order page verified - tested classic (light) and fine_dining (dark) presets with correct font and color application.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Menu Designer UI elements and dynamic styling working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Menu Designer feature fully tested. Located at: IRD & Minibar panel > Guest Platform tab > Menu Designer sub-tab. Features verified: 1) 3 sub-tabs: QR & Periods, Menu Designer, Menu Items. 2) 5 layout presets: classic, modern, bistro, fine_dining, brewery - all apply correctly via API and UI. 3) Typography section with 3 font dropdowns (Heading, Body, Accent) - 19 fonts available across serif, sans-serif, script, monospace categories. 4) Colors section with 6 color pickers. 5) Display Options: Show Emoji, Show Prep Time, Show Description checkboxes. 6) Card Style options: elevated, flat, bordered, glass. 7) Border Radius slider. 8) Header Text input. 9) Live Preview updates in real-time. 10) /guest-order page dynamically loads style from /api/guest-order/style and applies fonts/colors - tested with classic (light theme, Playfair Display) and fine_dining (dark theme, Cinzel font). Google Fonts are injected dynamically via link tags.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/guest-order/style - returns 19 fonts and all style fields
GET /api/guest-order/manager/style - returns current style + 5 layout presets
PUT /api/guest-order/manager/style - updates font_heading and persists to DB
POST /api/guest-order/manager/style/preset/fine_dining - applies dark theme with Cinzel
POST /api/guest-order/manager/style/preset/brewery - applies amber/dark theme with Abril Fatface
POST /api/guest-order/manager/style/preset/classic - resets to light theme with Playfair Display
POST /api/guest-order/manager/style/preset/modern - applies Montserrat with bordered cards
POST /api/guest-order/manager/style/preset/bistro - applies warm theme with EB Garamond
Font categories verified: serif (6), sans-serif (5), script (6), monospace (2)
frontend_menu_designer_tests: MinibarIRD panel > Guest Platform tab has 3 sub-tabs: QR & Periods, Menu Designer, Menu Items
Menu Designer shows Layout Presets section with 5 buttons: Classic, Modern, Bistro, Fine Dining, Brewery
Menu Designer shows Typography section with 3 font dropdowns (Heading, Body, Accent)
Menu Designer shows Colors section with 6 color pickers
Menu Designer shows Display Options with 3 checkboxes
Menu Designer shows Card Style options (elevated, flat, bordered, glass)
Menu Designer shows Live Preview that updates in real-time
Applying fine_dining preset updates Live Preview with dark theme
Applying classic preset updates Live Preview with light theme
guest_order_dynamic_styling_tests: /guest-order auth screen loads with dynamic styling from API
/guest-order with classic preset shows light background (#faf9f7) and Playfair Display headings
/guest-order with fine_dining preset shows dark background (#0a0a0f) and Cinzel headings
Google Fonts dynamically injected via link tags
Header text 'In-Room Dining' displayed from style configuration
Emojis, prep time, descriptions displayed based on display options
